7.q: The transgenic overexpressing IpASR Arabidopsis showed higher tolerance to salt and drought stress than the wild type and lower accumulation of hydrogen peroxide (H2O2) and superoxide (O2−) accompanied by increased antioxidant enzyme activity in vivo.

8.q: we identified two HKT genes, IpcHKT1;1 and IpcHKT1;2, in IPC... all analyzed species contain two HKT genes located adjacently on the same chromosome.
